title: canarium salomonense
intro: Canarium salomonense, also known as the Solomon Island canarium or Solomon Island candle tree, is a plant species native to the Solomon Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its oil and resin content. The health benefits of Canarium salomonense include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an oil by cold-pressing its seeds or as a resin, which can be applied topically to affected areas or used in aromatherapy.
